concepts.finding: R-CNN combines bottom-up region proposals with CNNs for object detection, achieving 53.7% mAP on PASCAL VOC 2010 by warping each region proposal to a fixed-size image and classifying with a CNN.
concepts.implication: Region-proposal-based approaches can be adapted to search: first identify candidate regions of interest in query space, then classify each candidate - analogous to candidate generation + reranking.
concepts.open_question: What is the text-domain equivalent of region proposals for query understanding?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A two-stage model that first proposes candidate query intents then classifies each will outperform flat classification on multi-intent queries by 20%+ F1.
